title: Vulkan Plus QoL
description: An Optimization Modpack using the Vulkan Rendering Engine with Quality of Life Features
body:
This lightweight optimization modpack utilizes Vulkan instead of OpenGL as the rendering engine. Due to this, some well-known optimization mods like Sodium couldn't be included, and shaders are not supported (for now). However, it still provides a significant FPS boost while maintaining the vanilla gameplay experience. For players who prefer a pure FPS boost without additional quality-of-life improvements, check out the "[Vulkan Plus](https://modrinth.com/project/vulkan-plus)" modpack. Please note that this modpack will only be updated for the latest version the Vulkan mod supports. Older versions will not receive further updates.   ## **FAQ** **What are the requirements to run this Modpack?** * You need a GPU that supports at least Vulkan 1.2. To check if your GPU supports Vulkan, run "vulkaninfo" in a terminal or command prompt. **Which graphics cards support Vulkan 1.2?** * **AMD:** Radeon RX 400 series and newer * **Nvidia:** GeForce GTX 900 series and newer **"My GPU supports Vulkan 1.2, but the game crashes!"** * Make sure you have the latest graphics drivers installed: [AMD Driver Download](https://www.amd.com/de/support/download/drivers.html) [Nvidia Driver Download](https://www.nvidia.com/de-de/geforce/drivers) **Does this modpack support shaders?** * Not yet. Shader support is being worked on by the Vulkan mod developers, but there's still a long way to go.   
Questions and Answers inspired by official Vulkan Wiki
